provenance.source: Hand-authored for toolcall-repair-bench; models a hypothetical prose mention of a tool with no call.

request_tools.name: web_search
request_tools.description: Search the public web and return ranked result snippets.

raw_output: I don't have live market data, so I can't quote you today's price. If you wanted the current figure, web_search would be the way to get it. Just say the word and tell me which exchange you care about, and I can look it up.
note: The model mentions `web_search` only hypothetically and waits for the user to confirm before searching; no call was emitted, so no_tool is correct.
